title: 4M Assorted Design Traditional and Cute Christmas Character Gift Wrapping Paper roll for Christmas - Pack of 8
features: 8 Different Traditional and Cute Designs Christmas Wrapping Roll
4 Meter roll for each design to suits your need for small or large gift packs
This Christmas wrapping paper comes in bright colour print of Santa, wreath, Stocking Leaves, Pine Cones, Reindeer, Snowman snowflakes, Christmas trees etc
Each Christmas gift packing roll measures 4m X 69cm
description: Christmas gift wrapping Paper roll in Cute and traditional Christmas Character Designs wrapping roll all different colour and Christmas character designs. Perfect for small gifts where patterns are wasted or for larger gifts that will be embellished with ribbons and bows, these assorted wrapping paper rolls is a brilliant way to ensure all your gifts are covered in style for your family, friends and colleagues a new and unique Christmas gift this year. Our Christmas wrapping paper rolls comes in pack of four or eight and each roll measures 4 meter in length and 69cm wide. Wrap yourself up in a world of festive magic with our wrapping paper, gift bags and more.
